---
title: "Teaching"
toc: false
---


```{=html}
<div class="course-card">
  <div class="course-title">
Introduction to R (In Spanish)</div>
  <div class="course-meta"> Ecomienza: Econthaki and BOWEN &nbsp;·&nbsp; 2023</div>
  <div class="course-links">
    <a href="https://github.com/monikavila/Curso-Introduccion-R" class="pill">Github</a>    
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="course-card">
  <div class="course-title">
Data analysis with R</div>
  <div class="course-meta"> School of Economics,University of Bristol &nbsp;·&nbsp; 2023</div>
  <div class="course-links">
    <a href="assets/courses/data-analysis-with-r/Data_Analysis_Course.pdf" class="pill">Slides</a>    
    <a href="assets/courses/data-analysis-with-r/Data_AnalysisR.R" class="pill">Lab</a>    
    <a href="assets/courses/data-analysis-with-r/Data_AnalysisR_solutions.R" class="pill">Lab Solutions</a>    
    <a href="https://github.com/monikavila/Data-Analysis-with-R/tree/main" class="pill">Github</a>    
  </div>
</div>
```


```{=html}
<div class="course-card">
  <div class="course-title">
Computer Labs Econometrics 2 Economics and Finance</div>
  <div class="course-meta"> School of Economics,University of Bristol &nbsp;·&nbsp; 2023</div>
  <div class="course-links">
    <a href="assets/courses/Stata/Lab2.pdf" class="pill">Lab 2</a>    
    <a href="assets/courses/Stata/Lab3.pdf" class="pill">Lab 3</a>        
  </div>
</div>
```
